mapper.select: SELECT w_tme.work_id , p.project_id , w_tme.task_id , w_tme.user_code , w_cls.task_classification_id AS workName , w_cls.work_name AS workNameLabel , w_tme.work_date , w_tme.spent_content , w_tme.spent_hour , 0 AS countSpentHour , 0 AS totalSpentHour , p.project_title , u.user_name , t.task_title , t.task_describe , t.estimated_time , t.task_progress AS taskProgress FROM work_time w_tme LEFT JOIN project p ON w_tme.project_id = p.project_id LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_code = w_tme.user_code LEFT JOIN work_classification w_cls ON w_tme.work_name = w_cls.task_classification_id LEFT JOIN task t ON t.task_id = w_tme.task_id WHERE w_tme.work_id = #{workId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_classification WHERE task_classification_id = #{workName} AND work_name = '완료'
